posts.title: write 페이지 프롬프트
posts.content:
Project stack rules (VERY IMPORTANT):
Build with Vanilla JavaScript
Use Vite
Use Dart Sass (SCSS)
Use Component-based architecture
Use ES Modules
Use SPA Router
Do NOT use React / Vue / frameworks

Create a page for the project using the following requirements.

PAGE NAME:
Write Page

PAGE ROLE:
Users can create a new post.

REQUIRED FEATURES:

* title input
* content textarea
* submit button
* validation
* API request

UI STRUCTURE:

Header
Form
Input field
Textarea
Submit button

Return:

1 HTML Template
2 JavaScript Logic
3 Required Components
4 API Request Structure
5 SCSS Structure
6 File locations
